c1.speaker: margie
c1.line: I don't like saying it, pet. But three nights back, His Guardianship sat in that corner nursing one (1) sherry and said — and I quote, because I always quote — "I'm not certain the boy is ready." Now what does a man mean by that, the week the boy takes his chair?

c2.speaker: gary
c2.line: And your lodger — the one with the maps. Still whispering about treasure?

c3.speaker: margie
c3.line: Worse since the ceremony, love. Checked in a week back, key's never on its hook past dark, and yesterday he asked me — at BREAKFAST — whether the monument has a false bottom. I quote exactly, you know I do.
